# kdev


## workflow

1. official_5.10.66 (official kernel 5.10.66)
    * official_5.10.66_image
    * official_5.10.66_kernel
2. ophub_6.6.y (ophub kernel 6.6.y)
    * ophub_6.6.y_image
    * ophub_6.6.y_kernel

## kdevbuild

1. official_5.10.66 (official kernel 5.10.66)
    * official_5.10.66_image.sh
   * official_5.10.66_kernel.sh
2. ophub_6.6.y (ophub kernel 6.6.y)
    * ophub_6.6.y_image.sh
    * ophub_6.6.y_kernel.sh

## kernel

1. official_5.10.66 (official kernel 5.10.66)
   * Image
   * rk3588-owl-ai-box-plus-v10.dtb
   * config-5.10.66-kdev
   * System.map-5.10.66-kdev
   * kos.tar.gz
2. ophub_6.6.y (ophub kernel 6.6.y)
   * Image
   * rk3588-owl-ai-box-plus-v10.dtb
   * config-6.6.y-kdev
   * System.map-6.6.y-kdev
   * kos.tar.gz

## image

1. official_5.10.66 (official kernel 5.10.66)
   * OWL_5.10.66_${set_rootfs}
2. ophub_6.6.y (ophub kernel 6.6.y)
   * OWL_6.6.y_${set_rootfs}
